name: Associação Brasileira dos Criadores de Girolando (ABCG)
note: Official Girolando breed association/registry (Uberaba); sets standards, registers pedigrees, supports semen/embryo export and genomic-evaluation exports. WebFetch got 403 (WAF); site is public in a browser. Registry portal: webgirolando.com.br.

name: Associação Brasileira dos Criadores de Gir Leiteiro (ABCGIL)
note: Official Dairy Gir breed association (Uberaba); runs the PNMGL bull summary with Embrapa. Registry/breed authority behind the genetics that are exported (incl. to India).

name: ASBIA — Assoc. Brasileira de Inseminação Artificial
note: National AI/semen-industry association; publishes INDEX ASBIA market & export statistics and co-signed the Brazil–India semen/embryo export study. Directory/authority hub for Brazilian AI companies, not a direct seller.

name: WTA - Watanabe Tecnologia Aplicada
note: 100% Brazilian repro-tech supplier: OPU, FIV, TE, AI equipment/consumables, exports 50+ countries. Tech/equipment (not embryos), relevant to Gir/Girolando FIV operations.

name: EPAMIG - Gir Leiteiro genetic material
note: Minas Gerais state ag-research company; sells Gir Leiteiro donors, bulls, oocytes and sexed embryos via annual Shopping Gir Leiteiro (Expozebu) + digital donor catalog (catalogo_shoping_gir_leiteiro PDF on epamig.br). Not directly fetched.

name: BAIF Sire Directory
note: Public BAIF sire/semen catalogue. Conventional & sex-sorted semen for indigenous (incl. Gir), crossbred and exotic breeds. Note: sire.baif.org.in 301-redirects here.

name: NDDB — Frozen Semen Production
note: National Dairy Development Board. Documents its 4 mega semen stations (SAG Ahmedabad, ABC UP, Alamadhi TN, Rahuri MH) all offering Gir among elite bulls; ~30% of national semen output. NDDB also imported 40k doses of Brazilian Gir semen.

name: Dairy Dimension — Rajasthan Brazilian Gir import (article)
note: News article (May 2025): Rajasthan distributing 2,680 doses of Brazilian Gir bull semen across 23 districts under National Gokul Mission; plans own sexed-semen lab. Useful lead for import channels/officials, not a seller.

name: Asocebú (Gyr genealogical registry)
note: Colombian Zebu association; official Gyr genealogical book, genetic evaluations, performance testing. Public info + SIR genealogy platform.

name: GanaderosVIP
note: Colombian brokerage/marketplace connecting buyers to certified Gyr breeders via WhatsApp; also courses & shop. Public.

name: Asociación de Criadores Gyr y Girolando del Ecuador (ASOGYRE)
note: Official Ecuador Gyr/Girolando breeders' association (~60+ members, 5,760 registered animals). No standalone website reachable (asogyre.com refused connection); public presence is Instagram/Facebook. Registry + fairs.

name: El Diario (Ecuador) - Gyr/Girolando market coverage
note: Ecuadorian news outlet documenting the Gyr/Girolando semen-dose (pajuela) and embryo market in Manabi/Santo Domingo; useful lead source for named haciendas. Not directly fetched.

name: Asociacion Mexicana de Criadores de Cebu (AMCC)
note: National Zebu registry covering Gyr; runs auctions, genetic evaluations, breeder galleries. HQ Tampico / Parque Zebu Altamira.

name: Asocebu Costa Rica — Gyr breed page
note: Asociacion de Criadores de Ganado Cebu de Costa Rica; genealogical registry for Gyr (9,746 Gyr registered 1994-2017), shows and member directory.

name: PLATICAR — Comunidad Lecheria Tropical y Ganado Girolando (INTA CR)
note: Costa Rica govt (INTA) tropical-dairy/Girolando community-of-practice info hub. Public page but returns HTTP 403 to automated fetches; likely live in-browser — flagged for manual confirmation.

name: CRICEPA (Asociacion de Criadores de Cebu de Panama)
note: David, Chiriqui. Zebu registry/breeder directory incl. Gyr; registrations and shows.

name: GuiagroNicaragua
note: Nicaragua agri directory/seller: Gyr, Gyrolando, Jersey, Pardo Suizo semen catalog plus breeding stock and embryos.

name: Perulactea
note: Peru/LatAm dairy-industry info portal; publishes Girolando/Gyr tropical-dairy technical content. Live, no paywall. Info/lead source, not a direct seller.

name: Alta Genética de Venezuela C.A.
note: Venezuelan genetics distributor (semen, embryos, livestock, AI supplies) incl. Gyr/Girolando. No standalone website found; Facebook is its only public presence, hence social category.

name: AVISA Venezuela (Asociación Venezolana de la Industria de Salud Animal)
note: Venezuelan animal-health industry association; publishes Girolando/Gyr tropical-dairy educational content. Live public blog. Info/association, not a direct seller.

name: INTA Banco de Semen y Embriones
note: Argentine national ag institute gene bank (bovine/equine semen & embryos). Live public gov page; general bovine repro, does not specifically itemize Gyr/Girolando. Included as national genebank/registry reference.

name: Asociación Rural del Paraguay (ARP)
note: Paraguay national livestock association; runs ORZARP breed registry and Expo Paraguay. Live public site. Registry/directory gateway to Paraguayan Gyr/Girolando breeders rather than a direct seller.

name: ASOCEBU Bolivia (Asociación Boliviana de Criadores de Cebú)
note: Bolivian zebu breeders association (Santa Cruz); registers Gyr Lechero and, since 2015 via agreement with Brazil's ABCGIL, the Girolando breed. Live public site; hub for Bolivian dairy-genetics sellers and Expocruz semen/embryo trade.

name: Publiagro
note: Bolivian agribusiness news site; ongoing Gyr/Girolando tropical-dairy coverage. Live public. Info/lead source, not a seller.

name: Associação Brasileira dos Criadores de Zebu (ABCZ)
note: Brazilian Zebu breeders' association (Uberaba); parent registry framework for Gir/zebu genetics feeding Girolando exports. Public (200).

name: Embrapa Gado de Leite
note: Brazilian gov't dairy-cattle research body; formally partners with ABCG/FAO to supply Girolando genetics and protocols to Nigeria and other African programs. Public (200).

name: Jassar Aftab — Livestock & Dairy Genetics Companies in Pakistan
note: Public directory of 13+ Pakistani dairy-genetics firms; states private semen units locally produce Gir and Girolando doses (does not break down by company).

name: Ditjen PKH (Indonesia) — Brazil Girolando cooperation
note: Indonesian Directorate General of Livestock news: Brazil offering Girolando dairy development/import cooperation to Indonesia post-FMD. WebFetch 403 (bot block); indexed and public.

name: RCR Peru
note: Peruvian ag news portal; documents Gyr dairy development (INIA El Porvenir, San Martin) via Brazilian imported semen. Info/lead source for Peru, not a direct seller. Verified live.

name: IndianCattle (Gowbazaar)
note: Live India directory + 'Gowbazaar' marketplace of pure-bred farms, Gir cattle sellers and semen suppliers by state; supported by Bombay Gowrakshak Trust.

name: DairyKnowledge Portal (NDDB)
note: Live NDDB knowledge portal; publishes the public 'List of Semen Stations' PDF (Gir/Sahiwal sources across India). Reference/registry for locating Indian Gir semen studs.
